🎬 Player Features

  • ✅ Native VLC Engine — wide codec support
  • ✅ Multi-Audio Support — dual audio track switching
  • ✅ Browser Player — ArtPlayer with fullscreen
  • ✅ Clipboard Copy — one-click link grabbing
  • ✅ Zero-lag UI — browser-engine rendering (no tkinter)

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

SpacePlay / Pause
FToggle Fullscreen
ESCExit Fullscreen
← / →Seek −10s / +10s
